key_claims: Taper can improve performance by up to 15%
Taper is defined as a period of reduced duration while maintaining or increasing intensity
Taper is described as the easiest way to get legal performance-enhancing gains
Discipline is required to execute an effective taper
specific_numbers: 90% of people abandon New Year resolutions by January
cluster_reasoning: Taper is a core training methodology and periodisation strategy that directly addresses structured training optimisation—classic coaching content—with secondary recovery elements since taper involves reduced training load and adaptation.
